name: Blood Scourge
Effect: Transforms a portion of the ritualist's blood into a stinging whip weapon (2L) that lasts until the end of the scene or sunrise.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: The ritualist's own blood at least one Vitae.

name: Apple of Eden
Effect: Enchants an apple (or another pome) that grants a mortal temporary dots in Intelligence and Wits upon consumption.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: An apple, a drop of Vitae.

name: Marian Apparition
Effect: An apparition of Mary or another womanly saint appears, inspiring fierce spiritual guilt in present vampires and treating their Humanity as lower for detachment.
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery vs. Humanity.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A piece of pure white cloth, stained with a single drop of menstrual blood.

name: Vitae Reliquary
Effect: Infuses an object with up to the ritual's Potency in Vitae, which can be retrieved by any vampire, Strix, or ghoul who touches the object.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: any object up to size 3.

name: Blandishment of Sin
Effect: The next time any bashing damage is inflicted on the victim, it is upgraded to lethal (or aggravated for the 4-dot version).
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery vs. Resolve + Blood Potency.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: a scrap of paper with the victim's name written on it.

name: Revelatory Shroud
Effect: Drapes a cloth shroud over an area or object that sullies, fades, and burns to reveal the face of the last person to touch the object or walk through the area.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A cloth shroud.

name: Curse of Babel
Effect: Renders the victim unable to speak or write until the next sunrise.
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery (Resisted by Resolve).
Prerequisites: Sacrament: an animal or human tongue.

name: Liar's Plague
Effect: Curses his victim, who must be present for the ritual, to not tell any falsehoods; if the victim lies, beetles swarm from his mouth.
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery vs. Resolve + Blood Potency.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: an insect carapace.

name: Malediction of Despair
Effect: Curses the victim so the next time he engages in a specific action, he suffers a -5 dice penalty.
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery vs. Resolve + Blood Potency.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: a lock of the victim's hair.

name: Gift of Lazarus
Effect: Raises a servant by animating a human corpse that retains all skills the person had when alive.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: a communion wafer placed under a corpse's tongue.

name: Apparition of the Host
Effect: Releases an apparition of avenging angels that chases a victim the breaker can see, inflicting the Frightened Condition.
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery vs. Resolve + Blood Potency.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A holly switch.

name: Bloody Icon
Effect: Offers emergency blood sustenance to a besieged Sanctified in exchange for the vampire recognizing what she is and abandoning her fetters to her past life.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: The caster's own Humanity, a statue of a saint.

name: The Walls of Jericho
Effect: Demolishes inanimate physical barriers (walls, vehicles, armor) between the caster and a designated subject via the blast of a horn.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A horn.

name: Stigmata
Effect: Curses his victim with the wounds of Christ, causing them to suffer lethal damage from blood loss or lose Vitae each turn.
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery (Resisted by Stamina).
Prerequisites: Sacrament: a crucifix.

name: Aaron's Rod
Effect: Enchants a rod or staff so it can be activated later to become a venomous serpent that does the activator's bidding.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A rod or staff.

name: Blessing the Legion
Effect: Blesses a group of crusaders with Vitae-stained armor, allowing the wearers to draw upon the Vitae to instantly heal wounds during battle.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A full suit of armor, modern or archaic.

name: Miracle of the Dead Sun
Effect: Sacrifices a dot of Humanity to blot out the sun with dark clouds, allowing all vampires in the domain to act as if it were night without penalties.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A piece of pure silver jewelry.

name: Transubstantiation
Effect: Transforms one substance to another, such as water into wine, lead into gold, a human into stone, or a wolf into a cat.
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery vs. Stamina + Blood Potency.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: a drop of liquid gold.

name: Pledge to the Worthless One
Effect: A heretical rite swearing a subject to the devil Belial, granting them a demon familiar in animal flesh in exchange for their soul.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A person content with his life.

name: Great Prophecy
Effect: Enacts a sweeping, unavoidable prophecy that predicts a great event for a group, clan, or covenant.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A body part of a saint.

name: The Guiding Star
Effect: Enchants a star and gold coins; holders of the coin intuitively know the direction to a highly protected safe haven.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A full, hand-crafted star chart, gold coins.

name: Apocalypse
Effect: Peels back the Masquerade in a wide area, causing vampires to appear their true corpse-like age and causing illusionary Disciplines like Obfuscate to fail.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A text, at least three hundred years old.
Target Successes: Special (10 base, additional successes increase radius)

name: The Judgment Fast
Effect: Curses a domain for a month, making it so any Kindred who ingests Vitae above their Humanity rating painfully vomits it back up.
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A table of rotten food.

name: Curse of Isolation
Effect: Severs the bonds between the subject and a vampire, cursing her fellow Kindred to solitude and sorrow, transferring the Touchstone to the ritualist.
Roll: Intelligence + Academics + Theban Sorcery vs. Resolve + Blood Potency (of the Kindred whose Touchstone is the ritual's subject).
Prerequisites: Blood Potency 6+ or 300+ years in the Covenant. Sacrament: any bladed weapon.

name: Orison of Voices
Effect: Attunes her ears to the voices of those who would call out to her; for three nights, whenever any voice speaks her name, she hears it and its context.
Prerequisites: Blood Potency 6+ or 300+ years in the Covenant. Sacrament: rosary beads.

name: Sins of the Ancestors
Effect: Allows the ritualist to ask questions about the target's close blood relatives, descendants, or lineage by plumbing consecrated blood for secrets.
Prerequisites: Blood Potency 6+ or 300+ years in the Covenant. Sacrament: Not detailed in source text.
